summary: Comprehensive testing of GoSocial MVP completed successfully. Backend APIs achieved 96.8% success rate (30/31 tests passed). Frontend and integration testing fully successful. All core features including JWT auth, lead management, AI-powered conversations, analytics, and templates are working properly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 'Email already registered' when test user already exists
Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: User login and JWT authentication
Demo data seeding (20 leads, 8 conversations, 8 templates)
Leads CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, filter, search)
Conversations management (list, view messages, send messages, star conversations)
AI reply suggestions using GPT-5.2 (generated 3 suggestions successfully)
AI lead scoring (scored test lead 84/100 as 'hot')
Analytics overview and pipeline data
Templates CRUD operations
Settings management
Frontend login page and authentication flow
Dashboard with stat cards and recent conversations
Leads page with table, filters, and add lead functionality
CRM inbox with conversation threads and AI suggestions
Analytics page with KPI cards and charts
Templates page with template cards and management
Settings page with user preferences
Navigation between all pages
Frontend-backend integration and data flow
Add lead form functionality
Dark theme SaaS UI design
